queryName: S3 Bucket Access to Any Principal
resourceName: Create a simple s3 bucket with a policy
searchKey: name={{Create a simple s3 bucket with a policy}}.{{amazon.aws.s3_bucket}}.policy
expectedValue: s3_bucket.policy.Statement shouldn't make the bucket accessible to all AWS Accounts
actualValue: s3_bucket.policy.Statement does make the bucket accessible to all AWS Accounts
